evidence_summary: [CH012_SC003] Purpose: To transition Carter from a prisoner to a chieftain with physical territory.

[CH012_SC003] Summary: Tars Tarkas approaches Carter and assists him in selecting quarters within a large building near Sola and the other prisoners. Carter makes a strategic choice, selecting a room on the third floor to maintain proximity to Dejah Thoris.
[CH012_SC003] Emotional arc: From tension/paranoia to pragmatic planning and tactical positioning.

[CH012_SC003] Coverage: * Two-shots of Carter and Tars Tarkas walking/discussing. * Establishing shots of the building and the view from different floors. * Point-of-view (POV) shots of Carter looking out from the third floor toward his goal.
[CH012_SC003] Continuity: The height/floor level selected; the layout of the buildings relative to the prisoners' locations.
